task: Parse an AWS CloudWatch log entry and extract the timestamp, log level, and message using a regular expression
solution_criteria: The regex must correctly capture timestamp (ISO 8601 format), log level (ERROR, WARN, INFO, DEBUG), and the remaining message text from standard AWS CloudWatch log format

task: Write a Python function that validates an AWS S3 bucket name according to AWS naming rules (3-63 characters, lowercase alphanumeric and hyphens only, no consecutive hyphens, must start/end with alphanumeric)
solution_criteria: Function must return True for valid bucket names and False for invalid ones, handling all AWS S3 naming constraints correctly

task: Create a JSON policy document for an AWS IAM role that grants read-only access to a specific S3 bucket
solution_criteria: The JSON must be valid IAM policy syntax with correct Action statements (s3:GetObject, s3:ListBucket), Resource ARNs for the bucket and its contents, and Effect set to Allow
